description: RIS Phase 3 seed corpus v3: all entries use structured_markdown extractor for richer metadata extraction. source_family=book_foundational for all entries (null half-life per freshness_decay.json — timeless foundational docs).

entries.title: RIS Overview
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Internal architecture reference doc for the Research Intelligence System. Describes the overall RIS pipeline, design principles, and component relationships.

entries.title: RIS Ingestion: Academic Sources
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Internal reference doc specifying ingestion rules for academic sources (arxiv, SSRN, books). Covers hard-stop criteria and quality gate thresholds.

entries.title: RIS Ingestion: Social Sources
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Internal reference doc specifying ingestion rules for social sources (Reddit, Twitter, YouTube). Covers credibility ceilings and evidence extraction patterns.

entries.title: RIS Evaluation Gate
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Internal reference doc for the RIS 4-dimension scoring rubric (relevance, novelty, actionability, credibility) and gate decision thresholds.

entries.title: RIS Knowledge Store
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Internal reference doc describing the SQLite-backed KnowledgeStore schema, document lifecycle, and retrieval interface.

entries.title: RIS Synthesis Engine
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Internal reference doc for the precheck synthesis engine: idea intake, evidence retrieval, GO/CAUTION/STOP recommendation logic, and ledger persistence.

entries.title: RIS Infrastructure
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Internal reference doc covering RIS deployment requirements, freshness decay configuration, and integration with ClickHouse and Chroma RAG backends.

entries.title: RIS Integration
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Internal reference doc specifying how RIS integrates with the broader PolyTool research loop: scan -> alpha-distill -> precheck -> hypothesis pipeline.

entries.title: PolyTool Master Roadmap v4.2
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Superseded by v5; retained for historical context. Contains Phase 0-3 planning from the v4 era.

entries.title: PolyTool Master Roadmap v5
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Predecessor to v5.1; contains Phase 0-4 planning. Still authoritative for Phase 0/1 strategy rationale.

entries.title: PolyTool Master Roadmap v5.1
entries.author: PolyTool Team
entries.notes: Current governing roadmap document. Defines triple-track strategy, validation gates, and Phase 1A/1B milestones.
